detail.name: SamplingParams
detail.description: Stores temperature, top_p, max_tokens, stop tokens. Passed to Sampler to control generation behavior.

teaches.explain: Bundle related parameters into one typed object instead of passing many loose arguments. Easier to validate, extend, and document.
temperature (randomness), top_p (nucleus filtering), max_tokens (length limit). Together control quality-diversity tradeoff in generation.
